column17:
Kit Overview:  ELYSIAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
✦ Cyrene’s Ultimate will summon Demiurge, activate all ally ultimates, enhance her Basic Attack, increase her and Demiurge’s CRIT Rate, deploy the zone gained from her skill, and enter a special state with no cooldown. Her First Ultimate requires 24 Recollection points to activate, this Ultimate can only be activated once. Demiurge is an Out of Bounds memosprite, it will not appear on the action bar, and can’t be targeted by allies or enemies.  

✦ Recollection is gained from ally actions with Future(+1) Cyrene’s Basic attack(+1), Enhanced Basic Attack(+3) and Skill(+3). Cyrene gains additional Recollection points depending on the amount of Chrysos Heirs or Remembrance characters in the party. Cyrene can hold up to 27 Recollection points.

✦ Demiurge will immediately take action upon using Cyrene's Ultimate. Using its memosprite skill on an ally will provide a Special Effect to Chrysos Heirs or a DMG increase to anyone else, requiring 12 Recollection points to use. The Special Effect is personalized to each Chrysos Heir and will be listed here along with reccomended team setups.

✦ When combat starts or after Cyrene takes action or when Cyrene uses Ultimate, all allies will gain Future. After an ally uses an ability, they will consume Future and Cyrene gains a Recollection. Memosprites do not consume Future after using an ability.

✦ When Cyrene’s speed exceeds 180, increase the team DMG and for every additional point of speed her Ice RES PEN is increased, capped at 60 speed.

✦ Cyrene’s Skill deploys a zone that will deal True DMG equal to 24% of each instance of DMG dealt by allies for 2 turns.
Synergies:
✦ Chrysos Heirs
Notes:
✦ Cyrene’s Recollection gain is quite slow without vertical investment or a full memosprite/Chrysos Heir team.

✦ Cyrene wants be paired with other Chrysos Heirs. Otherwise, her support potential is extremely lacking.

✦ Ironically enough, most Chrysos Heirs prefer other options without vertical investment on Cyrene. She can perform decently, with specific setups and teams at E0.
Tips:
✦ To quicken Recollection generation, you can hold your team's Ultimates and use it after Cyrene's turn.

✦ You can also weave in Cyrene's Ultimate smartly between allies' actions for maximized Recollection gain. Since Cyrene's Ultimate grants Future to allies.
column65:
✦ If you like the character, get them!

✦ Cyrene is a good support specifically for the Chrysos Heirs DPS. Her buffs are unique to each of them and can compliment them well enough.

✦ Due to how her Ultimate works, her generation of Recollection is incredibly slow without Remembrance temamates or E2, significantly decreasing her use cases in most teams.

✦ Cyrene is also locked to Chrysos Heir teams, and should not be used anywhere else.

column80:
E2 gives Cyrene 12 Recollection upon entering battle and increases the True DMG given by her Skill's zone proportional to the amount of Chrysos Heirs that receive her buffs. This eidelon significantly speed up Ultimate recovery, which helps her function more smoothly.

S1 increases the wearer’s SPD, and when a memosprite uses their skill on allies,  increases enemies DMG taken. When the wearer's memosprite use their skill on enemies, increases all allies CDMG. After activating both effects, their potency increases by a decent amount.

E1 gives Cyrene 6 Recollection when  Demiurge uses its attack skill, and increases the amount of bounces the attack does by 6.

column65:
✦ Please read this for team examples with each Chrysos Heir paired with Cyrene, as well as the Special Effect for each of them:

 LINK TO CYRENE'S EXAMPLE TEAMS

column17:
Kit Overview: HP Manipulating Rememberance Support/DPS
After entering combat or using Skill / Ultimate, Evernight will summon her memosprite, Evey. 
Evernight has large self CD, CR, and DMG% buffs, restores extra energy when she or allied Memosprites use abilities, and both she and Evey consume HP when using abilities.

Evernight's skill consumes her HP to increase the CD of ally memosprities in the team by 24% of her own CD

Evernight generates Memoria upon her and memosprite actions, or when losing health. 

Evey has two skills:
When Memoria is less than 16:
Evey deals single target damage based on the number of Memoria stacks
When Memoria reaches 16:
Evey action advances itself. Its next attack deals AoE damage based on the amount of Memoria possesed. Afterwards, all Memoria is consumed and Evey self-destructs, restoring one SP and increasing Evernight's speed, scaling on Memoria consumed, until her next turn.

Evernight's ultimate deals AoE damage and grants Evernight two charges of [Darkest Riddle].  While Evernight has charges of [Darkest Riddle], enemies receive increased damage,  Evernight and Evey deal more damage, and Evernight gains more Memoria after using her skill. Evey consumes a charge of [Darkest Riddle] after exploding.

Team synergies:
✦ Characters who consume allies' HP and/or gain benefit from Evernight and Evey's self HP drains.
✦ Remembrance Characters.
✦ Support characters to amplify team's DMG.
column45:
✦  If you like a character, get them!

✦ Evernight is a solid addition to Castorice's team.

✦ Evernight also performs well as a hypercarry DPS. However, her teambuilding is very restrictive thanks to her wanting rememberance characters, especially Hyacine, on her team. Therefore, her hypercarry team ends up having a large overlap with other premium teams.
column71: Evernight greatly benefits from having several rememberance characters on her team

column59:
E1: increases memosprite damage based on the number of enemies on field. Strong damage increase to memosprite focused teams.

S1: Ally memosprites ignore 20% of enemy DEF, the wearer and their Memosprite’s damage increases by 30%, and the wearer gains 8 energy after their Memosprite dies. Solid damage and buff, while allowing quicker Ult rotations for Evernight.

E2: Increases CD, increase Memoria gained by 2 and using Ultimate will provide 2 extra [Darkest Riddle] charges. This massively increases her personal damage output.

S1 is prioritized if there is no good alternative options for her.

column71: Potential future Remembrance DPS team (Or wheelchair)

column17:
Kit overview: Consistent team-wide healer and HP buffer
Hyacine summons Ica with her Skill or Ultimate, then heals the whole team, and cleanse 1 debuff. Ica normally does not appear in the action bar nor take actions. If any allies lose HP, Ica will consume its own HP to heal allies.

Upon using Ultimate. Hyacine heals the team and enters [After Rain] state, last for 3 turns. During [After Rain] state, all allies' max HP are increased. Ica will also launch an AoE attack upon using Ultimate.

During [After Rain], every time Hyacine uses a Basic Attack or Skill, Ica will gain an extra turn and deal AoE damage based on the amount of healing they've done, The more Hyacine and Ica heals, the more damage Ica does.

Synergies:
✦ Units that can benefit from Hyacine's max HP buff
✦ Characters that consume lots of HP and would appreciate her healing.
✦ Characters that highly appreciate the HP drain from her S1.

Notes:
✦ Despite being a HP scaling character, Mydei consumes way too much HP, and Hyacine's healing actually cannot keep up with him. It is suggested to use another Healer with Mydei unless Hyacine has high investments.
✦ Hyacine must spam her skill to maintain [After Rain] state. If the team does not need the max HP buff and her personal damage, Hyacine can spam Basic instead.
column45:
✦ If you like the character, get them!

✦ Hyacine is especially potent as a sustainer, so pulling her is a great choice if you don't have limited sustains.

✦ Her healing and Max HP boost is great for HP-scaling characters, which can further improve their damage and performance.

✦ Ica's personal damage can also be very potent if she has S1, so if you want your healer to funnel some damage, get her.
column71:
Her healing and max HP increase makes her an insanely strong sustain, and Hyacine can provide value for pretty much every team! Special bonus for HP-scaling chars
Having her S1 also makes her a great sustain for debuff centric teams!

column59:
S1 Increases SPD, whenever the wearer take action, they consume allies' HP and their memosprite deals Additional damage based on the consumed HP. Furthermore, whenever Memosprite uses their skill, apply Vulnerability to all enemies

E1 increases allies' max HP by an additional 50% and restore Hyacine HP whenever she attacks. This can be great for HP scalers.

E2 increases allies' SPD by 30% if their HP reduces.

S1 is generally recommended as it has good stats and damage amplification. Furthermore, the HP drain can greatly benefits units such as Blade or Jingliu.

column71: Premium Blade/Jingliu team (note : S1 Hyacine is wanted)

column17:
Kit overview: Super HP-draining AoE focused DPS
When allies lose or gain HP, Castorice will gain a special energy charge called Newbud, after she reaches 100% Newbud and uses her Ultimate, she summons Netherwing and creates a Territory that decrease enemies' RES. Netherwing has 3 attacks: 
[Skill 1]: consumes own HP to deal continuous AoE damage; [Skill 2]: deals 1 instance of AoE damage; [Skill 3]: when Netherwing disappear, it deals bounce damage to enemies. 

Netherwing cannot be targeted by enemies, and when Castorice gains Newbud, it will restore the Netherwing's HP instead. When your characters take fatal damage, Netherwing will take damage instead to keep them alive.
Castorice and Netherwing has various DMG% buff. Her skill consume a big portion of your party's HP and deals blast damage. When Netherwing is present, enhances the skill to consume a bigger portion of party's HP; deal greater damage and become an AoE Joint ATK

Once obtained Castorice, if 1 character take fatal damage, enter Mooncocoon state and take action normally, if not healed or shielded in the next turn, they will be downed. Triggers once per battle.

Synergies:
✦ Supports who can buff all target, including memosprites or AoE debuffers.
✦ Healer is a must, preferably one with high raw healing capabilities and can heal frequently.

Note:
✦Though Netherwing can sustain fatal DMG for the team, playing Castorice can be stressful, her abilities are also complex and require some learning for the best result.
✦ Sunday can potentially ruin Castorice's performance if you do not know how to utilize him well. It's recommended to use simpler options.
column45:
✦ If you like the character, get them!

✦ Castorice is undoubtedly a powerful DPS, with many self buff and abilities letting her perform relatively well even at lower investments 

✦ She is tricky to use and play, requiring a certain extent of game knowledge to be able to perform optimally which may not suit all players.

✦ Her abilities are mostly AoE with only 1 Bounce attack, which lower her performance in low targets battles.
column71:
The core of her team usually consist a good healer, most notably Hyacine, with the combination of supports such as Tribbie, Evernight, RMC, etc.
Her high HP-consumption can also be suitable for units who can make use of the HP drain.

column59:
✦ Hyacine provide max HP buff, and is the best Newbud generator for Castorice for all scenarios. She's the most important priority, Hyacine S1 also helps a lot.
✦ S1 increases max HP, when the wearer or their memosprite lose HP, their attack ignore DEF, when memosprite disappear, Action Advance the wearer by 12%.
Recommended pick due to the lack of options as well as great performance increase.
✦ E2: When using Ultimate, Action Advance Castorice by 100%, her Enhanced Skill restore 30% Max Newbud, [Skill 1] can be launched 2 more times. - Very powerful Eidolon, ramps up the DMG and summoning frequency.

column71: No Luocha or Hyacine, Gallagher is busy - Not recommended
Jingliu/Blade 2.0 - Meme team that actually work

column45: ✦ WORTH PULLING FOR +  VERTICAL INVEST EXPLANATION

column17:
Kit Overview: Lightning-Speed Blast DPS
Aglaea summons Garmentmaker on the field with skill, when she attacks, inflicts [Seam Stitch] on the primary enemy, when attacked by Aglaea and Garmentmaker, this enemy will receive Additional DMG.

After taking an action, Garmentmaker gains stacks of Speed buff.

When Aglaea uses her Ultimate, she enters Supreme Stance she also gains said Speed buff, immediately takes action, increases her ATK based on both units' speed, enhances her Basic Attack to make it a Joint ATK together with her Memosprite and constantly deal Blast damage to enemies. This enhanced state has a countdown.

Synergies:
✦ Character that can benefits from the high attacks frequency.
✦ Buffers, preferably who can also buff Garmentmaker at the same time.
✦ Units that can provide energy via energy recharge or allowing Aglaea & Garmentmaker to take more action.
Note:
✦ Aglaea does not have high Toughness-Reduction at base even when considering her amount of attacks.
Tips:
✦  Lets Garmentmaker take its turn if its Action Value is not far away to build up Speed buff stacks
✦  You are allowed to keep casting Ultimate even if Aglaea is already in the enhanced state to take more action and reset the countdown.
column45:
✦ If you like the character, get them!

✦ Aglaea is an excellent well-rounded DPS who can work for almost every content if you have the right team and setup for her.

✦ Aglaea has an energy cost of 350, to make her easy to manage at E0S0, you will want allies that can provide energy for her.. If you do not have E1 and/or premium supports for her, Aglaea will struggle to clear content.
column71:
Using a combination of Sunday, Robin, Tribbie or Remembrance Trailblazer will give good result.

Joint Attack combined with her high Speed can potentially make her an option for Dual DPS team

column45:
✦ Priority: E1 >>> S1 > E2
✦ If you already have Cyrene as well as a full Chrysos Heir team for Aglaea, the energy from E1 is not necessary to maintain her Supreme Stance. However, it is still recommended to get her E1 as it can potentially gives extra turns.

S1 provides 12 Base Speed, and provides CDMG% and Basic ATK when the wearer and their Memosprite attack. This LC can allow Aglaea to have even more setups and teamcomps, on top of solid buffs.

E2 gives up to 42% DEF Ignore when Aglaea and Garmentmaker repeatedly attack, but removed if other allies take action.

E1S0 or E1S1 is a good stop.
✦ WORTH BUILDING FOR +  VERTICAL INVEST EXPLANATION

column17:
Kit Overview: Generalist True DMG buffer
Trailblazer summons Mem on the field with Skill or Ultimate, Mem will appear in Action Order. If Mem is already summoned, it will heal Mem instead.

Mem has a special Charge bar, which is gained whenever allies gain energy,  at a 10 energy/1% Charge ratio. Mem also passively provides Crit DMG to the whole team based on own Crit DMG.

Their Ultimate orders Mem to deal AoE damage and generate 40% Charge,

Mem has 2 skills:
- When Mem's Charge is not full, deals AoE+Bounce on enemy while also generate Charge when taking action.

- When Mem's Charge is at 100%, Mem immediately take action, advancing a designated character by 100%, whilst providing them and their memosprite with Crit Rate and allow their attack to deal an extra instance of True Damage. The more Max Energy a character has, the stronger the True Damage buff they receive.

Synergies:
✦ Characters who are already oversaturated on self buffs or highly appreciate RMC's True Damage buff
✦ Character with high max Energy will benefit most from the True Damage buff
Tips:
✦ Try to manage Mem's charge to fully maximize the Action Advance from Mem's Skill. Try not to advance your DPS when they are already at 0 AV
column45:
✦ RMC is a great generalist support for most teams. It is recommended to build them if you need a flexible support option.

✦ RMC E6 is completely free so try to get them if you want to use them often.

✦ RMC has a few notable upgrades in terms of LC:
 1) Hyacine S1: Provide good SPD and provide Vulnerability debuff, which enhances RMC's support capabilities even more. The HP drain from this LC also unlocks more synergy with units who highly value HP drain such as Blade, Jingliu.
column71: RMC is a generalist support that can benefit in every team. They especially synergize with allies that have high energy requirement as it charges Mem faster.
Jingliu Premium (req. Hyacine S1 on both RMC and Hyacine)

column9: E if needed to charge Mem and if SP allows
